records.m_Talk_ENG: I really hoped a Category 3 wouldn't appear...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I really hoped a Category 3 wouldn't appear...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I really hoped a Category 3 wouldn't appear...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... I should be able to make something that fits you with its material.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... I should be able to make something that fits you with its material.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... I should be able to make something that fits you with its material.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then this must be a good thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then this must be a good thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then this must be a good thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did not expect the chilling energy that Lady Nanahara felt to be the cold air that the C.O. released.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did not expect the chilling energy that Lady Nanahara felt to be the cold air that the C.O. released.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did not expect the chilling energy that Lady Nanahara felt to be the cold air that the C.O. released.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. If we collect some material from that one, I'll be able to add some special magic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. If we collect some material from that one, I'll be able to add some special magic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. If we collect some material from that one, I'll be able to add some special magic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might be able to add a type of cold magic, similar to the lemonade that cooled you down earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might be able to add a type of cold magic, similar to the lemonade that cooled you down earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might be able to add a type of cold magic, similar to the lemonade that cooled you down earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are all sorts of C.O.s inside the barrier, but I didn't think we'd run into something so perfect for the situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are all sorts of C.O.s inside the barrier, but I didn't think we'd run into something so perfect for the situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are all sorts of C.O.s inside the barrier, but I didn't think we'd run into something so perfect for the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it definitely is a good thing, like you said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it definitely is a good thing, like you said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it definitely is a good thing, like you said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is, if we can take care of it safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is, if we can take care of it safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is, if we can take care of it safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, yeah. You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, yeah. You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, yeah. You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to watch out since we never know what's going to happen in Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to watch out since we never know what's going to happen in Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to watch out since we never know what's going to happen in Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like it has not found us yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like it has not found us yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like it has not found us yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are other C.O.s near it. Should we go directly in?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are other C.O.s near it. Should we go directly in?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are other C.O.s near it. Should we go directly in?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Evelyn and I are enough to kill the C.O.s in here, even if it's a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Evelyn and I are enough to kill the C.O.s in here, even if it's a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Evelyn and I are enough to kill the C.O.s in here, even if it's a Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And from the looks of how your little sister swung her sword around, I think she can easily handle it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And from the looks of how your little sister swung her sword around, I think she can easily handle it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And from the looks of how your little sister swung her sword around, I think she can easily handle it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is still a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is still a Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is still a Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one should lower their guard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one should lower their guard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one should lower their guard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right, but we can't just sit around here forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right, but we can't just sit around here forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right, but we can't just sit around here forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am waiting for the right time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am waiting for the right time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am waiting for the right time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Other C.O.s are gathering around the Category 3.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Other C.O.s are gathering around the Category 3.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Other C.O.s are gathering around the Category 3.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we were to vanquish them when they are grouped together, it should leave this area safe for the foreseeable future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we were to vanquish them when they are grouped together, it should leave this area safe for the foreseeable future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we were to vanquish them when they are grouped together, it should leave this area safe for the foreseeable future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is material that could help you make the costume,
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it is material that could help you make the costume,
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it is material that could help you make the costume,

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Chinatsu, will do my best to assist you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Chinatsu, will do my best to assist you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Chinatsu, will do my best to assist you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chifuyu. You can handle it, right? You better not get hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chifuyu. You can handle it, right? You better not get hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chifuyu. You can handle it, right? You better not get hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, my lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, my lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, my lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will fight them head-on. I would like to ask for your assistance, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will fight them head-on. I would like to ask for your assistance, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will fight them head-on. I would like to ask for your assistance, Dame Laura.
